case_title: ILANA R ATLAS VS. JOEL MALINSKI et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLAS, ILANA R AS TO DEFENDANT MALINSKI, JOEL MALINSKI, CAROL DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-05-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-03-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-20-2006
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-21-2006 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-19-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-05-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-18-2006 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAR-21-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-19-2006 CONTINUED TO SEP-18-2006 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SEP-18-2006 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: SUSAN LEE # 4280 (212)
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLAS, ILANA R ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST ILANA R ATLAS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-21-2006 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-05-2006. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: CARL SAUCEDA, CSR# 2031. (212)
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-19-2006 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST ILANA R ATLAS, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-19-2006, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-05-2006. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: BELDON YEE. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by Plaintiff. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Susan Lee # 4280 (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2006 Continued To Sep-18-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/18/2006 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Beldon Yee. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2006 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-19-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2006 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Carl Sauceda, CSR# 2031. (212)
